problem: Delays in diagnosing and treating cardiovascular conditions lead to poor patient outcomes. Care teams lack real-time, AI-driven insights from medical imaging data, resulting in communication gaps between specialists and delayed treatment decisions for time-sensitive cardiac conditions.
solution: Viz.ai One is an AI-powered care coordination platform with 50+ FDA-cleared algorithms that analyze medical imaging data including CT scans, EKGs, and echocardiograms. The Viz Cardio suite auto-detects suspected cardiovascular diseases in seconds, delivering real-time insights and automated assessments to accelerate diagnosis, streamline workflows, and support faster treatment decisions across neurovascular, cardiovascular, vascular, trauma, and radiology therapeutic areas.
